name: AI-powered web researcher with Exa search and Slack delivery
description: Uses Exa to search the web for a given research topic, scrapes the top results with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to synthesize findings into a comprehensive research report, and posts it to Slack.

source.originalName: The ultimate free AI-powered researcher with Tavily web search & extract

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping search results

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the research report

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the research report

researchTopic.description: Research topic or question (e.g. 'Latest developments in quantum computing 2025')

maxSources.description: Maximum number of sources to research (default 5)

steps.name: Build Exa search query from research topic
Scrape top search results for deeper content
Compile all research from Exa and Firecrawl
Build AI prompt for research synthesis
Run Claude AI for research synthesis
Build Slack Block Kit research report
